{{Quote|In the mission ahead, locate the Rebel officers who are fleeing from Hoth in a stolen Imperial Shuttle.|Priest|<ref name="Star Wars: TIE Fighter" />}}
'''''Scutz''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] that was stolen by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Alliance Military/Legends|Officers]].

==History==
{{Quote|After about, five minutes into the battle, while I was still engaged with the X-wings, I noticed a Rebel shuttle had jumped in. The scanners said it was SHU Scutz. I inspected it before attempting to fire on it and discovered it was carrying some Rebel officers.|Maarek Stele|<ref name="TIE Fighter Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide">''[[TIE Fighter Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''</ref>}}
The shuttle was originally used by the Empire before it was stolen by Rebel Officers. The shuttle would then participate in a joint [[Defense of Outpost D-34|attack]] on [[Outpost D-34]] by the Alliance and [[Mugaari pirates]], arriving within 5 minutes into the battle.<ref name="Star Wars: TIE Fighter" />

The shuttle was attempting to sneak past the Outpost carrying rebel officers. However, [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]], who was then an above average [[TIE pilot]] picked up the shuttle on his scanners while engaging [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]]. He managed to get close and inspected it to find Rebel Officers. Once that was done, he was contacted by the [[Priest (Secret Order of the Emperor)|Priest]] informing him that [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] are being dispatched. The Gunboats engaged the ''Scutz'' launching [[Concussion missile/Legends|Concussion missiles]] which drained the [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]] and disabled it with their [[Ion cannon/Legends|Ion cannons]]. Once the shuttle was disabled and immobile [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]]s ''[[Epsilon (disambiguation)|Epsilon]]'' [[Epsilon 1|1]] proceeded to board and capture it. The Shuttle then departed from the area entering [[Hyperspace/Legends|Hyperspace]] to an unknown location.<ref name="Star Wars: TIE Fighter" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Scutz'' features in the [[1994]] [[Wikipedia:Personal computer|PC]] game [[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] and its [[Prima]] [[TIE Fighter: The Official Strategy Guide|Strategy]] [[TIE Fighter Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide|Guides]]. The shuttle is to be inspected by the player to complete "Secondary" mission objectives. The capture of the shuttle is the missions "Bonus" objectives which can only be seen once they are completed.

*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
